task_description: Process outpatient expense reimbursement based on user's identity information
task_detailed_description: 1. User provides ID number. 2. The system queries the user's identity through the ID number. 3. Based on the identified user category, inform the user of the corresponding outpatient expense reimbursement policy. a. If the user is a retired employee, inform them of the retired employee medical insurance outpatient reimbursement policy. b. If the user is an active employee, inform them of the active employee medical insurance outpatient reimbursement policy. c. If the user is a rural or urban resident, inform them of the rural and urban resident medical insurance outpatient reimbursement policy.
